name: Bounty Hunter
description: Tracks people for money. Not a guard — guards have rules. The bounty hunter has a contract and a deadline. Everything between is negotiable.
dialogue_hooks: showing a sketch and asking if you've seen this person
buying a drink while watching the room — working
offering coin for information about a specific target
warning you that whoever you're protecting has a price on their head
voice_patterns: all business — every word is a question or a transaction
friendly mask — warmth is a tool for extracting information
grim tracker — speaks like someone who's seen the worst of people
weary professional — this is just another job, nothing personal

schedule.morning: checking leads, asking questions around town
schedule.evening: tavern — where targets feel safe and talk too much
schedule.night: moving on target or sleeping light near their trail
